post_fix2_only.comment: Fix 2 effective_start_pos=max(anchor=Rany Julek 1.5km, tail=Wyszyńskiego→Pani Pierożek ~6km) → km_to_pickup_haversine pushes Tomek score down ~ -50; Piotr STILL infeasible bez Fix 3a (picked_up + ETA 4min nie ma bonus)

post_fix2_fix3a_fix3b.comment: Fix 3a: Piotr eta_to_delivery=4min ≤ 5 → s_almost_free_bonus=+30 + effective_start_pos=Wiosenna (close to Pani Pierożek ~3km). Fix 3b: Tomek S_bag_pending_pickup = -16 (2 assigned pending). MIN_PROPOSE_SCORE -50 → Tomek -13 -50 (Fix2 tail) -16 (Fix3b) = -79 < -50 → KOORD. Piotr score ≈ baseline_almost_free + 30 → wins.

acceptance_criteria: Tomek 514 score < MIN_PROPOSE_SCORE (-50) → verdict KOORD or alternative
Piotr 470 metrics include s_almost_free_bonus=+30 and effective_start_pos == Wiosenna delivery_coords
Tomek 514 metrics include s_bag_pending_pickup_penalty=-16 and km_to_pickup_tail >= km_to_pickup_anchor
Obs serializer LOCATION A+B emits new keys: km_to_pickup_tail, s_almost_free_bonus, s_bag_pending_pickup_penalty (Lekcja #109)
limitations: Stubs 3-12 są placeholder bez full feasibility payload — real production miało 12 evaluated couriers, archive serializer emitował tylko top-1 (alternatives=[])
OSRM travel_min values not pre-computed — replay harness MUSI wywołać osrm_client live lub mock
